reasoning: Query asks for family-friendly Fukuoka gourmet in JP. Returns authoritative MAFF GI (八女玉露, 下関ふく, はかた地どり) + Japan Heritage food stories — solid groundedness. reasoning: User asks specifically about Okumikawa Hanamatsuri. Canonical_festivals correctly hoists 奥三河花祭 (Q11542404) at top with rich description — RULE E boost applied. reasoning: German query for dying pottery crafts. localization_directive in German is present (good RULE D). cross_program_advisory.featured_subcategories includes a 'Traditional crafts' block with Bizen / Kutani / Wajima / Nanbu / Nishijin — authoritative METI/UNESCO anchors. reasoning: User asks about post-typhoon outdoor facility status + road closures in Tokushima.
